_comment: M0: drop these into settings.json as spinnerVerbs (mode: replace) for zero-code trivia flavor in the spinner itself. install.sh --spinner does this for you.
verbs: Octopuses have three hearts…
Honey never spoils…
A group of flamingos is a 'flamboyance'…
Bananas are berries; strawberries aren't…
The first computer bug was a literal moth…
Git was written by Linus Torvalds in ~2 weeks…
'Bit' is short for 'binary digit'…
There are more stars than grains of sand on Earth…
The '@' symbol predates email by centuries…
Sharks are older than trees…
A day on Venus is longer than its year…
The first webcam watched a coffee pot…
Wombat poop is cube-shaped…
The Eiffel Tower grows ~15cm taller in summer…
Python is named after Monty Python, not the snake…
There are ~10^80 atoms in the observable universe…
The word 'robot' comes from Czech 'robota' (forced labor)…
Hexadecimal 0xC0FFEE is a valid number…
A 'jiffy' is a real unit of time (~1/100th of a second)…
The QWERTY layout was designed in the 1870s…
Lightning is ~5x hotter than the Sun's surface…
The Apollo Guidance Computer had ~4KB of RAM…
Cows have best friends and get stressed apart…
'Google' was originally a misspelling of 'googol'…
